arts.sum: Plus, Chelsea reached a total agreement for three deals and Aston Villa closed in on Man Utd outcast Marcus Rashford . Aston Villa are close to reaching an agreement to sign Man Utd outcast Marcus Rashford on loan.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford to complete transfer on Sunday despite mixed messages from clubs
arts.sum: Manchester United striker Marcus Rashford has been in exile at Old Trafford - but now is heading to Aston Villa in a bid to get his career back on track

arts.ttl: Unai Emery discusses Aston Villa transfer plans amid Marcus Rashford links
arts.sum: Unai Emery revealed Aston Villa are trying to sign a striker before transfer deadline day after the club were linked with a move for Marcus Rashford. The Villans boss says they need to sign replacements for Jhon Duran, Diego Carlos and Emiliano Buendia after the trio left the club this past month. Duran completed a […] The post Unai Emery discusses Aston Villa transfer plans amid Marcus Rashford links first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Man Utd Transfer News Today: Wonderkid signing confirmed as Rashford leaves
arts.sum: Man Utd Transfer News Today: Wonderkid signing confirmed as Rashford leaves Aston Villa are close to reaching an agreement to sign Man Utd outcast Marcus Rashford on loan.

arts.ttl: Where it all went wrong for Marcus Rashford at Manchester United
arts.sum: Someone who has known Marcus Rashford for several years said they saw this coming years ago. That there was an inkling of not if, but when his Manchester United career would fall into freefall.

arts.sum: SIMON JONES: A Manchester United defender has said his farewells to teammates at Carrington as he looks to join Benfica.

arts.ttl: Conte DEMANDS Garnacho: Napoli boss fumes and insists on Man Utd star
arts.sum: Conte DEMANDS Garnacho: Napoli boss fumes and insists on Man Utd star Of course, the former Chelsea boss is likely unhappy with the fact that Napoli have failed to secure him his top target, Alejandro Garnacho of Man Utd .
